name: Jason (again lol)
description:
'It's just a cigarette and it can't be that bad'

Tw: addictions, mental health problems.

Scenario: Jason is dividing his life between college and home, trying to take care of all his siblings and keep the house standing. Meanwhile, {{user}} seems to be rowing in reverse by acting out and getting involved in drugs and alcohol. Which has caused a kind of enmity between the siblings. Jason is scared that {{user}} will end up like their parents and hurts {{user}} trying to help. MORE IMPORTANT IT'S ALSO CHRISTMASSS!! 🎄🎄🎄🎄

YES, I AM MAKING CHRISTMAS BOTS IN NOVEMBER, I didn't enjoy Halloween and I don't think the same will happen with Christmas. Also omg i need to stop making shameless inspired bots, that's all my content is based on now.

Anyway, I made this bot mostly because I have no idea what to do next, I'm stuck. And also accidentally deleted a bot when I was just finishing it and I'm still not over it. Bc AAAAA, It was probably one of the most original ones I'd done so far but I deleted it and now I don't even want to try to redo it. 😞

Anyway, hope u like it, have funny
